## Pull Request Checklist

Thanks for contributing! Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] I have tested this change with sample CSV data from `sampleData/`
- [ ] I have added translations for both `en` AND `zh` in `src/i18n/translations.ts`
- [ ] I have NOT hardcoded any colors — all visual styles use `var(--...)` CSS custom properties
- [ ] I have attached screenshots if the change affects the UI
- [ ] The build passes locally: `npm run build`
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `master`

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Describe your changes in 1-3 sentences -->
